mnemonics: Design Experiments Carefully, Analyze Numerically, Verify Outcomes (DECANO) for ANOVA
keyPoints: ANOVA compares means between groups by analyzing variance within and between groups
F-statistic is the ratio of between-group variance to within-group variance
Assumptions include normality, homogeneity of variances, and independence of observations
commonMistakes: Using ANOVA when data violates normality or equal variance assumptions
Performing multiple t-tests instead of ANOVA when comparing more than two groups (increases Type I error)
Failing to perform post-hoc tests after finding significant results in ANOVA
